lines.text: Holiday Sleigh Rides at Fort Wilderness Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Horse Drawn Excursion - Holiday Sleigh Rides
LocatedinThe Campsites at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort

Take in the magic of the holidays with a cozy carriage or "sleigh" ride through the festive campground and woodland beauty. The 2025 offering has concluded. Check back this summer for updates on the 2026 holiday season.
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
Horse Drawn Excursion - Holiday Sleigh Rides are currently unavailable. This seasonal experience is scheduled to return in late 2026—just in time for the holidays.
In the meantime, you can book a horse-drawn carriage ride at Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground.
Get in the spirit of the season as you travel along scenic trails aboard a merry sleigh.

Enjoy this 25-minute ride at the new Tri-Circle-D Ranch barn near the Settlement Bus Depot at The Cabins and Campsites at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort. Sleighs fit up to 4 adults, or 2 adults and 3 small children.
Please allow for 60 minutes of transportation time, as Guests will be required to park at the main entrance of Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground and take a bus to the Settlement Bus Depot.
Recreation at The Campsites at Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort
Recreation options abound at this picturesque backcountry retreat.
Recreation at The Cabins at Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort
Discover an array of ways to relax and unwind in this rustic, wooded setting.
